title: ee.mesh.discovery_policy.v1
description: Per-peer discovery policy posture emitted by `ee mesh discovery-policy --json` (SRR6.46.7). Read-only view of the modes, allowlist, denylist, and effective per-peer decisions that govern who SRR6.46.2 probes and who the SRR6.46.12 hello responder admits.

allowlistedNodeKeys.description: Workspace-scoped allowlist read from `.ee/discovery_allowlist.toml`. Empty when the file is absent. Sorted lexicographically for deterministic output.

deniedNodeKeys.description: Workspace-scoped denylist read from `.ee/discovery_denylist.toml`. Empty when the file is absent. Sorted lexicographically. Denylist takes priority over both auto_admit and allowlist matches.

selfAdvertisedTags.description: Tags this host advertises via `tailscale up --advertise-tags=...`, sourced from the SRR6.46.1 probe. The presence (or absence) of `tag:ee-mesh` determines whether `respondMode=service_tag` admits discovery requests.

effectiveDecisionPreview.description: Optional preview returned when `--explain` is set. One entry per known tailnet peer with the policy decision evaluated against the current modes + lists.

nodeKey.description: Stable tailscale node identifier (e.g. `nodekey:<base64>`). Redactable under the `tailscale_metadata` class.

advertisedTags.description: Tags the peer advertises (from the SRR6.46.1 probe's peer list).

decision.description: Caller-side decision for whether SRR6.46.2 would issue a hello to this peer.
